project.title: Prison Break Arena
project.description: Top-down action game set in a brutal maximum-security prison.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange accents, thick readable silhouettes

asset.name: prison_inmate_walk
asset.action: smooth walk cycle to the right, loopable stride, arms swinging naturally, side view

negative_hints: Never generate a multi-frame spritesheet from one image prompt.
Preferred path: reference still → video → split frames → trim → rembg.

pipeline.note: character reference still (must pass pure-white validate)

pipeline.prompt: gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange accents, thick readable silhouettes. prison inmate character, smooth walk cycle to the right, loopable stride, arms swinging naturally, side view. Solid pure white background (#FFFFFF) throughout. Not a spritesheet.
